records.m_Talk_ENG: Matryoshka Dolls...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Matryoshka Dolls...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the girls from the poster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the girls from the poster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the girls from the poster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What business does the Northern Army have here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What business does the Northern Army have here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What business does the Northern Army have here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm certain there is no reason for you to be protecting our village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm certain there is no reason for you to be protecting our village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm certain there is no reason for you to be protecting our village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nonsense. We're here to defend all of the Northern Union's lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nonsense. We're here to defend all of the Northern Union's lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nonsense. We're here to defend all of the Northern Union's lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This Counterside Effect is a weird phenomenon that's been happening all across the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This Counterside Effect is a weird phenomenon that's been happening all across the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This Counterside Effect is a weird phenomenon that's been happening all across the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we were just a little bit late, it would've been a disaster here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we were just a little bit late, it would've been a disaster here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we were just a little bit late, it would've been a disaster here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever your intentions are, we don't trust anyone from the Northern Army.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever your intentions are, we don't trust anyone from the Northern Army.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever your intentions are, we don't trust anyone from the Northern Army.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're here to save us? Bull crap!

records.m_Talk_FRA: You're here to save us? Bull crap!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you have an ulterior motive. Now, get out of here!

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you have an ulterior motive. Now, get out of here!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_DEU: D-D-Dreka...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-D-Dreka...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Eek! I-I just thought that you needed some help...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, sis, for knowing when to step in and help Dreka out.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I hurts... so much...

records.m_Talk_ENG: P-please... s-stop hitting me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: P-please... s-stop hitting me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: P-please... s-stop hitting me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was uncalled for... You know I could've explained to that old man too...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was uncalled for... You know I could've explained to that old man too...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was uncalled for... You know I could've explained to that old man too...

records.m_Talk_ENG: He seemed angry at me, and he still hated me even after I smiled and explained the situation.

records.m_Talk_FRA: He seemed angry at me, and he still hated me even after I smiled and explained the situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think I can't do it, right, sis? You think I'm going to cause another commotion?

records.m_Talk_FRA: You think I can't do it, right, sis? You think I'm going to cause another commotion?

records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I was just... looking out for you as your older sister...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww!

records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sorry... It's all my fault... I won't cut you off next time, Dreka.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sorry... It's all my fault... I won't cut you off next time, Dreka.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, sis, for knowing when to step in and help Dreka out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, sis, for knowing when to step in and help Dreka out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, sis, for knowing when to step in and help Dreka out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go back now. We might get scolded by the soldiers if we're late.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go back now. We might get scolded by the soldiers if we're late.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go back now. We might get scolded by the soldiers if we're late.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-ahhhh... I just...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-ahhhh... I just...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-ahhhh... I just...

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-Dreka! Wait for me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: D-Dreka! Wait for me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-Dreka! Wait for me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What was that all about...? I'm so confused.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What was that all about...? I'm so confused.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What was that all about...? I'm so confused.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha? Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha? Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha? Are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... I'm just concerned about the Northern Army coming here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... I'm just concerned about the Northern Army coming here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... I'm just concerned about the Northern Army coming here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Same here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Same here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Same here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe that those two are also Dolls like me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe that those two are also Dolls like me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe that those two are also Dolls like me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's my first time seeing another Doll, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's my first time seeing another Doll, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's my first time seeing another Doll, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyah! Aghh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyah! Aghh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyah! Aghh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... Gugh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... Gugh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... Gugh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-It hurts... so much...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I hurts... so much...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I hurts... so much...

root.m_Talk_ENG: P-please... s-stop hitting me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: P-please... s-stop hitting me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: P-please... s-stop hitting me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was uncalled for... You know I could've explained to that old man too...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was uncalled for... You know I could've explained to that old man too...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was uncalled for... You know I could've explained to that old man too...

root.m_Talk_ENG: He seemed angry at me, and he still hated me even after I smiled and explained the situation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He seemed angry at me, and he still hated me even after I smiled and explained the situation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He seemed angry at me, and he still hated me even after I smiled and explained the situation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think I can't do it, right, sis? You think I'm going to cause another commotion?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think I can't do it, right, sis? You think I'm going to cause another commotion?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think I can't do it, right, sis? You think I'm going to cause another commotion?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I was just... looking out for you as your older sister...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I was just... looking out for you as your older sister...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I was just... looking out for you as your older sister...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaak!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaak!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaak!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oww!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oww!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oww!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm sorry... It's all my fault... I won't cut you off next time, Dreka.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sorry... It's all my fault... I won't cut you off next time, Dreka.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sorry... It's all my fault... I won't cut you off next time, Dreka.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. You said that people get sad when their loved ones are hurting. But I'm not sad at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. You said that people get sad when their loved ones are hurting. But I'm not sad at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. You said that people get sad when their loved ones are hurting. But I'm not sad at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Liar... Were you lying to me, sis?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Liar... Were you lying to me, sis?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Liar... Were you lying to me, sis?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
N-no
8g Kyaah!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
N-no
8g Kyaah!
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8g Kyaah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-but... D-Dreka, you're going easy on me because you care...
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-but... D-Dreka, you're going easy on me because you care...
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-but... D-Dreka, you're going easy on me because you care...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think I'll break if you hit me too hard... that I might get hurt...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think I'll break if you hit me too hard... that I might get hurt...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think I'll break if you hit me too hard... that I might get hurt...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... really?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... really?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... really?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes! Really...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes! Really...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes! Really...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it... You're the best, sis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it... You're the best, sis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it... You're the best, sis.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're my most precious person...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're my most precious person...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're my most precious person...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sis... promise you'll always be next to me, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sis... promise you'll always be next to me, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sis... promise you'll always be next to me, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle* I-I promise...
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle* I-I promise...
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle* I-I promise...

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-where are you going?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-where are you going?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-where are you going?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to check out the village. It's been so long since I've met people! I'm so excited.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to check out the village. It's been so long since I've met people! I'm so excited.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to check out the village. It's been so long since I've met people! I'm so excited.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I really want to become friends with... the two girls we met earlier.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I really want to become friends with... the two girls we met earlier.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I really want to become friends with... the two girls we met earlier.

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-Dreka... you shouldn't go out on your own...!
